programme.title: Toulouse vs Saint-Raphaël - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Burgos vs Almeria - LaLiga Hypermotion 2025-2026 - Spanish La liga 2
programme.desc: La Liga 2 is the men's second professional association football division of the Spanish football league system. It is contested by 22 teams, with the top two teams plus the winner of a play-off promoted to La Liga and replaced by the three lowest-placed teams in that division.

programme.title: Basaksehir vs Samsunspor - Turkish Super League - MD 33 - 2025-2026
programme.desc: The Turkish Süper Lig is the top-flight competition of the Turkish football league system and is live and exclusive on beIN SPORTS. The season runs from August to May, with each club playing 38 matches. Matches are played Friday through to Monday. Galatasaray are the current Champions.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.

programme.title: Arsenal vs Atlético de Madrid - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. programme.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

Barcelona lost their last LaLiga away game against Osasuna 4-2 in September 2024, ending an eight-game unbeaten run on the road against them ; they have not lost consecutive away league matches against the Navarrese side since 1984.

programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Tottenham Hotspur - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Aston Villa won this exact fixture 2-0 last season, last beating Tottenham Hotspur in consecutive home league games in May/November 2004. Tottenham Hotspur have lost six of their last 10 Premier League games against Aston Villa, more than they had in their previous 34 against the Villans.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: RCD Espanyol have won three of their last six home games against Real Madrid in LaLiga, as many victories as in their previous 15 such meetings in the top flight. programme.title: Freiburg vs Sporting Braga - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Freiburg remain winless against Portuguese opponents in European competition. Should they fail to win here, they will have played more European games against sides from Portugal without managing a victory than against teams from any other nation. Braga hold a 2-1 lead from the first leg of this tie against Freiburg; however, each of the last three Portuguese sides to win the first leg of a UEFA Europa League tie beyond the round of 16 have still failed to progress.

programme.desc: The Americas GP at Circuit of the Americas features Moto3, Moto2, and MotoGP across a full race weekend, including qualifying, the MotoGP Sprint, and the main races. programme.title: Qualifying - Moto 2 - France Round
programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demanding round.

programme.title: Qualifying - MotoGP - France 2026
programme.desc: The MotoGP paddock arrives at Jerez for the Spanish Grand Prix, where MotoGP, Moto2 and Moto3 come together at one of the sport’s most iconic and atmospheric tracks. programme.title: Manchester United vs Liverpool - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Manchester United have won just three of their last 19 Premier League games against Liverpool, though are looking to complete the league double over the Reds for the first time since 2015-16. Liverpool have won three of their last five away league games against Manchester United, as many as in their previous 18 visits to Old Trafford.

programme.title: Espanyol vs Real Madrid - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: RCD Espanyol have won three of their last six home games against Real Madrid in LaLiga, as many victories as in their previous 15 such meetings in the top flight. Real Madrid have won 109 of their 179 LaLiga matches against Espanyol, the record for the most wins by one team against another in the history of the competition.

programme.title: Osasuna vs Barcelona - Spanish LaLiga 2025/26 - Week 34
programme.desc: Osasuna have won only one of their last 11 LaLiga meetings with Barcelona and are currently on their longest ever run without a clean sheet against the Blaugrana in the competition. programme.title: Chelsea vs Nottingham Forest - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Chelsea are looking to complete the Premier League double over Nottingham Forest for just the second time, after the 1998-99 campaign. Nottingham Forest have lost just two of their eight Premier League away games against Chelsea, and are unbeaten in all three visits to Stamford Bridge since their return to the competition in 2022.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Everton vs Manchester City - English Premier League 2025/2026 Week 35
programme.desc: Everton have lost their last eight home league games against Manchester City, their longest run of consecutive defeats against an opponent in their history. Manchester City are unbeaten in their last 17 Premier League games against Everton, since a 4-0 loss in January 2017.

programme.title: Al-Ahli Saudi The Champions Of AFC CL Elite 2025/2026
programme.desc: Saudi club Al-Ahli FC secured their status as Asia’s top club by winning the 2025/2026 AFC Champions League Elite title, defeating Japan's Machida Zelvia 1-0 in the final on April 25, 2026, at King Abdullah Sports City Stadium in Jeddah. Al-Ahli FC became the first team to win back-to-back Asian titles since city rival Al Ittihad in 2005.

programme.title: Bayern München vs Paris Saint-Germain - UEFA Champions League 2025/26 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Paris SG 5-4 Bayern Munich in the first leg was the highest scoring European Cup semi-final match since Eintracht Frankfurt beat Rangers 6-3 in 1959-60. Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

Across both legs, in major European competition the most goals in any semi-final was in that Frankfurt – Rangers tie, which ended 12-4 on aggregate to the German side. In UEFA Champions League history, only one team has ever scored five goals in a knockout match and then been eliminated in that tie, which was Manchester City against Monaco in the last 16 in 2016-17.

programme.title: Aston Villa vs Nottingham Forest - UEFA Europa League 2025/2026 - Semi Finals - 2nd leg
programme.desc: Aston Vila are unbeaten in each of their last 10 meetings with Nottingham Forest at Villa Park across all competitions, since a 2-0 loss in the Premier League in October 1994 under Ron Atkinson. Nottingham Forest are unbeaten in each of their three European games against fellow English opposition, keeping a clean sheet each time – their only previous away match was at Anfield versus Liverpool in the 1978-79 European Cup first round, drawing 0-0.

programme.desc: Arsenal remain unbeaten against in the Atlético Madrid in the UEFA Champions League, winning 4-0 at the Emirates and drawing 1-1 at the Riyadh Air Metropolitano Stadium this season. Only two other managers have gone unbeaten in their first three games against Atlético boss Diego Simeone in the competition: Carlo Ancelotti and Maurizio Sarri. programme.desc: The Ligue 1 head-to-head record between Strasbourg and Toulouse is perfectly balanced, with 28 wins each and 19 draws. programme.title: Olympique Lyonnais vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 32
programme.desc: If he plays, Valentin Rongier will make his 300th Ligue 1 appearance. He has captained his side from the start of a Ligue 1 match more often than any other player in 2025-26, level with Toulouse’s Rasmus Nicolaisen. Alfonso Moreira’s seven assists have been worth nine points to Lyon in Ligue 1 this season, more than any other player. Similarly, teammate Pavel Sulc’s 11 goals have earned 11 points for OL in 2025/26, with no player earning more points for their team this season.

programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Race 1 - Red Bull Ring Round - Formula Regional European Championship 2026
programme.desc: Event at the Red Bull Ring (4.318 km, 10 turns) in Spielberg, Austria. The Formula Regional European Championship runs two races per weekend, each approx. 30 minutes + 1 lap. Cars are Tatuus F3 T-318 chassis with Alfa Romeo 1.75L turbo engines (~270 hp). FIA Super Licence points are awarded, with 25 points for a race win.

programme.desc: The Americas GP at Circuit of the Americas features Moto3, Moto2, and MotoGP across a full race weekend, including qualifying, the MotoGP Sprint, and the main races. programme.title: Qualifying - Moto 2 - France Round
programme.desc: MotoGP heads to Thailand at the Chang International Circuit in Buriram, a track defined by long straights, heavy braking zones, and intense heat. The stop-start layout challenges tyre management and rider endurance, while strong acceleration out of slow corners is crucial. Local support and Honda’s home presence add extra intensity to this demanding round.

Aix vs Tremblay - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Madrid Marathon 2026
programme.desc: Madrid Marathon, first held in 1978, is one of Spain’s leading road races. The event features three distances — marathon, half marathon and 10K — and drew a record 45,000 runners from 118 countries in 2025. The elite field competes for prize money, while the course is known for its city-center landmarks, crowd support and demanding rolling profile.

programme.title: Limoges vs Aix - LNH Division 1 - French Handball Starligue
programme.desc: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s 14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

programme.title: Al Shahania vs Al Kharaitiyat - Qatar Stars League 2025/26 - Play-Off
programme.desc: The Qatari League is the official football league in Qatar. The league includes 12 teams. The Qatari league includes star names such as Firmino, Verratti, and Qatari Akram Afif, the best player in Asia.

programme.title: Football Legends - News
programme.desc: In the world of sports, few debates ignite passion and enthusiasm quite like the discussion surrounding the greatest football players of all time. This topic transcends generations, cultures, and nationalities, as fans passionately defend their favorites and recount unforgettable moments on the pitch. From legendary goal scorers to masterful playmakers, the players who have left an indelible mark on the game deserve recognition and celebration. " Football Legends" explore the remarkable careers and contributions of these iconic players who have shaped the beautiful game.

programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.

programme.title: Red Star vs Montpellier - French Ligue 2 - 2025/2026
programme.desc: Ligue 2 is the second division of French football. Ligue 2 is contested by 18 clubs, the league operates on a system of promotion and relegation with both Ligue 1 and the third division Championnat National. The teams play 34 games each, totaling 306 games in the season. The biggest games from each match Day are live and exclusive on beIN.

programme.title: Universidad Católica (CHI) vs Cruzeiro (BRA) - Copa Libertadores 2026 - Group Stage - MD4
programme.desc: The 2026 Copa Libertadores is the highest level of competition in South American club football. The competition began on 3 February and is scheduled to end on 28 November 2026, with the final to be played in Montevideo, Uruguay. Flamengo are the defending champions.
